description: This file contains utility functions for date/time formatting, debouncing functions, and generating consistent tag colors, likely used throughout the frontend project.

methods.name: export function formatDateTime(iso?: string): string { formatDateTime
methods.description: Formats an ISO string into a localized date and time string; returns empty string if input is invalid.

methods.name: export function debounce<TArgs extends unknown[]>( debounce
methods.description: Creates a debounced version of a function that delays its execution until after waitMs milliseconds have elapsed since the last call.

methods.name: export function stableTagColor(tag: string): { border: string; bg: string; text: string } { stableTagColor
methods.description: Generates deterministic, neon-like color schemes for tags to ensure consistent styling.
